words.def: a sudden intense burst of radiant energy
words.zh: n. 閃光, 閃現, 一瞬間

words.def: one of two equal parts of a divisible whole
words.zh: n. 一半, 半場, 不完全

words.def: the residue that remains when something is burned

(astronomy) the angular distance of a celestial point measured westward along the celestial equator from the zenith crossing; the right ascension for an observer at a particular location and time of day
words.zh: have的第三人稱單數現在式
